programmes.show_description: Thriller with Dougray Scott. It's a race against time when a man travelling on the train with his son realises the brakes have been sabotaged and they are speeding toward a fatal collision. (2013)
Blood-drenched Hammer horror. When a seductive vampiress returns from the grave, she casts her alluring spell over all who encounter her, including the young women at a finishing school. (1971)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Western adventure with Kenny Rogers. After losing his job, a former rodeo champion leaves his home in Texas behind for a job herding mustangs in Wyoming. (1985)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
An old friend of Hooker is arrested for a series of hold-ups at local supermarkets, but the cop is not convinced of his guilt and sets out to bring the culprits to book. S2, Ep2
Vince's fellow cops - including Hooker - criticise him for not exacting revenge by shooting a fleeing juvenile responsible for killing an officer. S2, Ep3
Hooker persuades a blind witness to testify against murderous thieves, knowing that she's putting herself in great danger. S2, Ep4
Hooker and Romano track a dangerous man who attacks unsuspecting female joggers, and try to set a trap for him before he strikes again. S2, Ep5
Hooker hunts a psychotic sniper with a murderous grudge against the police, who is plotting to blow up the precinct. S2, Ep6
Western action adventure. The most infamous outlaw in the history of the Wild West embarks on the most dangerous robbery of his career as he takes on the mysterious Black Train. (2018)
Fantasy with Christian Bale. In the aftermath of decades of apocalyptic attacks, a ragtag community joins forces with a dragon slayer in a final attempt to save the world from destruction. (2002)
Fantasy adventure with Nikolaj Coster-Waldau. An ancient Egyptian god driven into exile seeks the aid of a thief in reclaiming his father's throne from his brother. (2016)
An elderly, wheelchair-bound spinster begins receiving strange anonymous phone calls in the middle of the night. Gladys Cooper guest stars. S5, Ep19
A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a very advanced computer named Agnes, who wreaks havoc on his love life. S5, Ep20
Thriller with Denzel Washington. While a police hostage negotiator deals with a bank robbery-turned-siege, a political fixer is sent to make sure secrets in the vault stay hidden. (2006)
Thriller with Noomi Rapace. After failing to apprehend the terrorist behind a Paris attack that claimed many lives, a CIA agent is determined to prevent a lethal biological attack on London. (2017)
Action thriller with J. K. Simmons. When a team of Navy SEALS in war-torn Europe discover gold at the bottom of a lake, they try to retrieve it for the locals - but are detected by the enemy. (2017)
High-octane crime thriller with Nicolas Cage. A crew of former prisoners are hired by the eccentric head of a crime syndicate to kidnap the baby of a rival mobster. (2016)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker pitches in to race for the Cherokee Indian racing team... S6, Ep15
Hooker hunts a psychotic sniper with a murderous grudge against the police, who is plotting to blow up the precinct. S2, Ep6
Internationally famous physician Dr Rudy Wells relates the series of events leading up to astronaut Steve Austin's horrific accident. S1, Ep1
Disaster drama. When a global scientific summit fails to stop an asteroid hurtling towards Earth, a young tech genius assembles her own team of specialists to stop the impending disaster. (2020)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Western with Barry Sullivan. A wealthy and crooked rancher cuts off a town's water supply in a bid to blackmail the locals, leaving a tough-talking marshal to sort things out. (1968)
Western with Martin Sheen. A greenhorn fur trapper steals a prized white mustang from a Kiowa Indian warrior, who sets off in pursuit across the savage canyons to get the horse back. (1979)
A routine stop-off sees several crew members killed, and Kirk is determined to find out why. S1, Ep2/30
Dr Wells continues to discuss Steve's road to recovery, combined with the trauma of becoming part-man, part-machine. Steve performs his first bionic feat. S1, Ep2
As violence erupts on a busy street, Romano gets caught in the crossfire and suffers a nasty head wound, while Hooker is accused of shooting an unarmed youngster. S2, Ep7
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. Trivette's girlfriend disappears and pictures of her surface on an internet site... S6, Ep16
Nautical horror with Treat Williams. Modern-day pirates overrun an ocean liner, only to face a grotesque sea monster lurking in the bowels of the ship that has already killed the passengers. (1998)
Tense thriller with Rutger Hauer. A lone teenage motorist finds himself unwillingly implicated in the crimes of a psychopathic hitch-hiker engaged in a rampant killing spree across America. (1985)
